programme.title: The Office: Health Care
programme.desc: When Corporate wants Michael to pick a cheaper health plan for his employees, Michael shirks responsibility and Dwight happily accepts the task. Delighted with his new position of power, Dwight manages to offend everyone.

programme.title: The Office: The Alliance
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim form an alliance to protect themselves during the upcoming downsizing.

programme.title: The Office: Basketball
programme.desc: The office staff prepares for a game of basketball against the workers in the warehouse.

programme.title: The Office: Hot Girl
programme.desc: Michael believes he is going to 'score' when he gives an attractive woman a ride home.

programme.title: The Office: The Dundies
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin employees suffer through the annual office awards ceremony, The Dundies, hosted by their pompous boss Michael Scott at their local watering hole.

programme.title: The Office: Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Just as his best friend Todd Packer visits the office, Michael fears that a new corporate crackdown on sexual harassment will dampen his reputation.

programme.title: The Office: Office Olympics
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight are out of the office for the day as Michael tries to close a deal on a new condo for himself. Meanwhile, Jim and Pam organize an "Office Olympics" where the staff members compete in ridiculous games.

programme.title: The Office: The Fire
programme.desc: A fire in the kitchen forces the employees of the Dunder Mifflin paper company to the parking lot. To ease everyone's boredom, Jim suggests a game where staff members reveal a little too much information about themselves.

programme.title: The Office: The Fight
programme.desc: After Dwight karate punches Michael, Jim organizes a lunchtime rematch at Dwight's dojo where Pam becomes annoyed when Jim gets too friendly with her.

programme.title: The Office: The Client
programme.desc: When Michael and Jan go after a new client, Michael surprises his boss in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Jim finds a screenplay written by Michael and the cubicle jockeys at Dunder Mifflin have a hilarious time acting it out.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.desc: The case of a troubled missing boy quickly turns into a homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Closer: Sudden Death

programme.title: The Closer: Split Ends
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson has her hands full trying to solve a murder when a hairdresser on a movie set is found dead. Meanwhile, Brenda's folks are in town pressuring her to set a wedding date.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sanctuary City
programme.desc: As the case of the St. Joseph's three leads to its unexpected conclusion, Commander Sharon Raydor attempts to balance the case, her family arriving, and her fast approaching wedding to Lt. Andy Flynn.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: When a well-known attorney, celebrated for her defense of oppressed women is found dead, there is no shortage of high-profile suspects including her son, her ex-husband, a film director whose career she destroyed and a football player.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: As the squad investigates the death of a second woman related to the Tackles case, and a new theory materializes, Sharon faces a health setback. Meanwhile, Gus reacts unexpectedly to Rusty's partial solution to their ongoing relationship problems.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Lit Christmas

programme.desc: It's the story of three awesome grab and go breakfasts. Breakfast cookies are a perfect jump start on the morning. Then there's a bountiful bento box with baked oatmeal and individual ham casseroles. Finally, Todd makes apple granola stackers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cleaning Out The Fridge
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cleaning out her fridge and using up food that's on its way out. She's turning milk and cream into a wonderful lemon rice pudding with leftover lemons, while the produce drawer is transformed into a cool, delicious fridge gazpacho.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Meals: Cowboy Favorites
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing 16-minute favorites for cowboys and cowgirls, too. She makes steak medallions and potatoes, gnocchi with chorizo and corn, crisp in a pinch and finally a chicken jalapeno popper quesadilla.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All in the Family
programme.desc: Guy invites a family of four chefs to go head-to-head in a fun-filled face-off for big bucks and bragging rights. First, the family members are forced to make a hot lunch using only five pounds of ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Fried Feud

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Blue Plate Blues
programme.desc: Four chefs compete to see if one roll, spin or outrageous game will make or break their dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Spiciest!

programme.desc: Siblings struggling to sell their sister's home need Lyndsay and Leslie's expertise. The twins redefine the dated two-bedroom rambler into a modern three-bedroom farmhouse with a deck that will be enjoyed even on a rainy Pacific Northwestern day.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Mid-Mod Oasis
programme.desc: A homeowner seeks Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell her inconsistently styled midcentury modern house. By decking out a dreamy backyard oasis and trimming trees to show off the water and mountain vista, the twins clear the way for a high sales price.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Day Care Redo
programme.desc: A woman that operates a day care out of her house is having trouble selling since buyers can't visualize her business as a family home. Lyndsay and Leslie transition the commercial space back into a cozy residence with a vintage farmhouse style.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Madhouse - Marshall, Missouri
programme.desc: Steve and Amy investigate claims of terrifying paranormal activity at an historic movie theatre in Marshall, Missouri. After hearing the owner's experiences, Steve unearths evidence of a deadly love triangle and Amy interacts with dangerous entities.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Vengeance - Albuquerque, New Mexico
programme.desc: Steve and Amy investigate claims of violent paranormal activity at a family-owned restaurant in Albuquerque. Steve finds disturbing evidence that five people died on the property and Amy clashes with several dead people.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: How Nude
programme.desc: Luann hosts an eclectic lunch party for the ladies at her Sag Harbor home with a nude male model as the main event. Leah's frustrations with Ramona boil over, and Luann and Eboni get into a heated debate that leaves everyone reeling.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Stop and Throw the Roses
programme.desc: The gravity of Luann and Eboni's paint party confrontation begins to set in, and beachside fishing turns cold when politics are brought up in conversation. Meanwhile, Heather’s faux pas comes back to haunt her.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Electile Dysfunction
programme.desc: After the ladies compete in Luann’s 70’s inspired Halloween pageant, Leah receives devastating news about her grandma. Back in the city, Ramona reviews her real estate skills, while Leah and Eboni help Sonja learn to land a punch.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Never Before Scene: A Harlem Night
programme.desc: An elite and powerful set of New York socialites as they juggle careers and home lives.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: The Salem Bitch Trials
programme.desc: Eboni takes Sonja to Philadelphia to meet a matchmaker. Leah hosts an excursion to the witch capital of the world, Salem, Massachusetts. At Leah’s latex and leather dinner, Eboni questions some of the ladies' allegiances.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Deck the Halls with Drama
programme.desc: Robyn and Juan seek couples therapy to move forward in their relationship. Gizelle works hard to make sure Robyn’s engagement goes off without a hitch, but Michael's skepticism causes her to panic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Savannah's Big ID-EA
programme.desc: When an influential Southern magazine asks The Chrisleys for an interview about all things fashion, Todd insists on trying to control the situation by writing a script for his family to memorize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Life's a Pitch
programme.desc: Todd thinks that he's saving the day when he steps in to coach Grayson's baseball team, but when he discovers he's in way over his head, he must figure out a way to regain the respect (and control) of these overzealous 9 year olds.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Getting Testy
programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: My Chrisley Valentine
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Chase is dating several different girls on Valentine's Day, he recruits Savannah to help teach his son a lesson about respecting women.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Savannah has a rose coloured view of what her spending habits will look like when she goes off to college.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys on Campus
programme.desc: When the Chrisleys take a road trip to Nashville to tour a college campus, Todd is excited for the additional family bonding time. Savannah tries to gain independence and go out with new friends, but Todd goes to the extreme and crashes her big night out.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Reunion Part One
programme.desc: Andy Cohen reflects on some of the season's biggest moments as the ladies of medicine come together in part one of an explosive three-part reunion.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Reunion Part One
programme.desc: Part one of an explosive three-part reunion begins, as the Potomac ladies come together for the first time since the altercation that divided the cast.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Surlesque

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Lisa's Angels

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Addicted

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Sherlock Stassi

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Rich People Annoy Me

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Sur of the Border

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: The Ultimatum

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Bitch Slap

programme.title: Counting Cars: Satanic Mechanic
programme.desc: Danny is visited by legendary Mistress of the Dark, Elvira, whose famous Thunderbird is in need of some mechanical magic.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Framed
programme.desc: Horny Mike discovers a coveted bike frame on private property and convinces Danny to risk it all by sneaking inside.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Size Matters
programme.desc: Danny's friend Brian has always wanted to ride a motorcycle, but has never been able due to his physical limitations. Will Danny and the guys be able to get Brian in the wind for the first time?

programme.title: Counting Cars: Really Sweet 16
programme.desc: Danny conspires with a proud dad to give the ultimate surprise 16th birthday gift, and the shop frustrates a customer with a design error on a scaled-down commemorative Model T Firetruck.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Dream On
programme.desc: Count's Kustoms speeds to the rescue after Kevin's son encounters trouble on the racetrack. Danny stumbles upon an extremely rare 1979 Dodge Dreamer, and mad mechanic Gordon stops by with a monster street machine that blows the guys away.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Muscle Memory
programme.desc: Kevin is won over by a hotrod pick-up truck. Danny tracks down a customer's original 1969 Firebird, but its terrible condition may make it impossible to restore, and an unannounced visitor causes drama at the shop.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Get Your Kicks
programme.desc: Danny takes on a Route 66-inspired Chevy for the famed highway's biggest fan, and later teams up with his good buddy, American Restoration's Rick Dale, on an unusual project for a customer.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Charger Surprise
programme.desc: Danny decides to feature the 12 favourite cars in his collection in an official Count's Kustoms calendar, and later, a customer wants Danny to build him a classic Charger just like his dad used to have.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count's Calendar
programme.desc: The huge photo shoot day for the Count's Kustoms calendar is approaching. Danny has decided to have his guys each find, and take a picture with, their dream car for the back cover.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Chevy Truck Tribute
programme.desc: A family brings in an old pickup truck to be restored in memory of their mom, and Danny needs to figure out how to build the perfect tribute vehicle without blowing the budget. Later on, he finds a rare old Oldsmobile 442 that the owner wants to sell.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph
programme.desc: Danny and the team are commissioned to restore a 1941 Triumph motorcycle back to its World War II-era glory. Even with a $50,000 budget, the project turns into one of the biggest challenges in Count's Kustoms history.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph
programme.desc: The crew continues to piece together a WWII era Triumph motorcycle for a client hoping to have it as a tribute to his family's military roots.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Better Late Than Never
programme.desc: Shannon recruits the guys to help him finish up a gift for Danny: a bike he started building for him 10 years ago. Ryan works to keep Danny out of the shop so that Shannon can finish the bike, and winds up buying a sweet Baja Bug in the process.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Low Riding Lincoln
programme.desc: Danny and Ryan have big plans for a low riding Lincoln. Lonnie, one of the shop's long time painters, wants to give his Lincoln lowrider a new, but simple, paint job but that's not going to happen.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Big Truck Custom Combo
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned to custom paint a brand new pick-up for a charity auction for the local YMCA. But Danny can't stop at paint, he adds the ultimate accessory a matching chopper that fits in the back.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Heavy Metal Caddy
programme.desc: Brann Dailor, drummer for the Grammy-winning heavy metal band Mastodon, brings in his 1970 Cadillac Coupe DeVille for some much-needed Counts Kustoms love.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count Down to SEMA
programme.desc: Danny and the guys attempt to complete a 1961 Cadillac Coup de Ville to get two cars into the world's largest auto trade show.

programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: My Own First Enemies
programme.desc: Sydney struggles with navigating the pitfalls of social media when she posts her music online and receives negative comments.

programme.desc: When Mr. Arthur tells Booker that he isn't ready to go from sweeping floors to cutting hair at the barbershop, Booker opens his own mobile barbershop in the boys' school bathroom.

programme.title: Jessie: Make New Friends But Hide the Old
programme.desc: Emma's first day of high school starts badly when she clashes with tough transfer student Rosie. The two soon become friends when they realize they have a lot in common. Kenny the Koala winds up in Luke's backpack, and Jessie struggles with Zuri.

programme.title: Jessie: Trashin' Fashion
programme.desc: Emma is excited that her mom is planning a fashion show to showcase her new teen fashion line. Once Emma sees the terrible designs, she becomes conflicted about whether she should give honest reviews on her fashion blog.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Flugelball-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Diggie returns from Tundrabania, but he and Maddie have trouble reconnecting. Joey tries to solidify his relationship with Diggie through the Tundrabanian sport of Flugelball.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Frame-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Ridgewood's mascot has been vandalized, and the Rooneys all become suspects. Meanwhile, Parker has the day off from school and gets into trouble at home with Reggie.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Princesses and Prizes
programme.desc: Austin agrees to be auctioned off on a date in order to help raise money for Ally's charity.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Cupids & Cuties
programme.desc: Trish is nervous about an upcoming visit from a boy she has a crush on and does not act like herself when he takes her out on their first date.

programme.title: Jessie: Coffee Talk
programme.desc: Jessie gets two VIP wristbands to a Bruno Mars concert so Emma and Zuri battle to be her guest, only to learn there's only one ticket that Jessie has for herself. They team up to get back at Jessie for pitting them against each other.

programme.title: Jessie: A Close Shave
programme.desc: Darla shows up and doesn't know that Jessie called off her wedding, so Jessie gets Tony to act like Brooks to try and fool her. Meanwhile, Luke is still trying to master the art of shaving his face for the first time.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Onichan
programme.desc: Kagami gets akumatized into Oni-Chan, where she tries to keep Lila away from Andriena for good.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Miraculer
programme.desc: Sabrina gets akumatized by Hawk Moth. Now Miraculer, she can steal their powers from superheroes and is determined to show Chloe that she is just as worthy of her interest as Ladybug.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Buttercup Amber
programme.desc: Amber agrees to go on an overnight hike with Sofia and the Buttercups despite her distaste for the outdoors and ends up saving the day when the rest of the troop is trapped by a swamp monster.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Carol of the Arrow
programme.desc: When Sofia meets her idol, Carol of the Arrow, and joins her merry band of do-gooders, she learns that there are many different ways to help people.

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: National Bob Day/ 7th Inning Fetch
programme.desc: Bob and the pugs head to the Baseball Hall of Fame. Bingo and Rolly throw a National Bob Day to make Bob feel special.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Bluey: Kids/ Butterflies/ The Creek
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: After losing a contest to become lead host on the Kidz Plus children's channel, Aurore is akumatized into Stormy Weather. With villainy in the forecast, it's up to Ladybug and Cat Noir to stop her and bring sunshine back to Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Stormy Weather 2
programme.desc: Aurore Boreale gets akumatized again. Now Stormy Weather 2, she wants to prove her power by plunging the Earth into a never-ending winter. Ladybug and Cat Noir will have to keep their cool if they want to stop her.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Gamer
programme.desc: Adrien and Max enter a tournament for the videogame, Ultimate Robot Strike. After losing a challenge, Max gets akumatized into Gamer and unleashes a giant robot on Paris. Ladybug and Cat Noir are faced with a real-life video game.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Gamer 2.0
programme.desc: Max gets akumatized by Hawk Moth again. Now Gamer 2.0, he captures all the former akumatized villains and challenges Ladybug and Cat Noir to free them by playing against him. Let the game begin again.

programme.title: Bluey: Muffin Cone/ Circus/ Road Trip
programme.desc: Muffin has to wear a cone of shame! Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus! The Heelers go on a road trip!

programme.title: Bluey: Helicopter/ Octopus/ Baby Race
programme.desc: Bluey turns a tree stump into a game of Helicopter. Chloe tries to teach her dad to play Bluey's game. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Date Night/ The Room
programme.desc: Bill chaperones Cricket and Gabriella's first date. Then, Tilly closes up Cricket's secret escape hole in their room, sparking a conflict that leads them to splitting the room down the middle.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Bleeped/ Sellouts
programme.desc: Cricket is amused by a new socially unacceptable word in his big city world and tempts fate by repeating it. Then, the Greens try new methods to improve sales at their produce stand.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fast Foodie/ Spaghetti Theory
programme.desc: When a Burger Clown franchise opens next door, Cricket tries to prove to Bill that he can eat fast food for every meal with no ill effects. Then, Tilly and Cricket debate whether the lives of people in Big City are intertwined.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Jessie: Somebunny's in Trouble
programme.desc: When Zuri loses interest in bunnysitting her class pet, Jessie steps in, only to lose the rabbit. Meanwhile, Emma has a crush on a school jock and enlists Luke’s help to learn more about sports.

programme.title: Jessie: Throw Momma from the Terrace
programme.desc: Jessie invites Bertram's mom to visit as a surprise for his birthday. However, unbeknownst to Jessie, Bertram and his mom do not get along. Meanwhile, Ravi and Luke compete in a school egg-drop competition.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today

programme.title: Public Affairs Events

programme.title: Washington Journal

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vendetta
programme.desc: Beloved by his colleagues, Mark Hasse was a fearless prosecutor. He worked to put criminals behind bars and making enemies was a hazard of the job. He didn't know it, but a killer was lurking and Mark wasn't the only target.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery on the Mississippi
programme.desc: A mother of four dies unexpectedly on Valentine's Day. Everyone in town assumes she died of natural causes until a detective suspects someone has gotten away with murder. But would a jury agree?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly House of Cards
programme.desc: After Johnny Altinger vanished, the trail of clues led investigators to a young director. Detectives worried that the case was a hoax staged by a master storyteller. Turns out, the script was darker than anyone knew.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: Michele and Lloyd Neurauter were devoted to their three daughters, even after divorce. When Michele was found dead in her home, police suspected suicide. Then, they uncovered a deadly betrayal too twisted to be true. Except that it was.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Carrollton Plot
programme.desc: This is a story about faith, temptation and secrets. A churchgoing mom was shot at point-blank range in her garage. Saving her would take a miracle and investigators wanted to know if this crime was random or if someone wanted her dead.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Murder in the Keys
programme.desc: Young newlyweds Michael and Susan 'Missy' MacIvor were living the dream in the Florida Keys with a baby on the way. But the Florida Man strikes in paradise, when under the cover of a storm, the MacIvors become victims of a triple homicide.

programme.title: Cold Justice: The Professor's End
programme.desc: Kelly and Tonya Rider investigate the strange death of a retired college professor in Tonya's home town, whose cremation was halted by an anonymous tip call, hinting at murder. An autopsy proves the tipster right.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Holding Onto Hope
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny Bonds return to their home state of Texas to look into the disappearance of a young mother in 2000, whose family has never given up on her. While some suspect murder, others claim to have seen her on the run with a mystery man.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Down By the Lake
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny Bonds answer the call of a grieving mother, whose 19-year-old son drowned while camping with friends. While the medical examiner ruled it an accident, some suspect foul play.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Start Digging
programme.desc: When the team finds the body of a widowed, single-mother, they are shocked to discover that the victim was in constant contact with Voight's now-reformed son, Justin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Made a Wrong Turn
programme.desc: When Burgess and Tay respond to a report of vandalism, they find a badly beaten young man. It appears the young man's fiancée is missing. Meanwhile, Lindsay has a surprise for Halsted, and Fogel berates Platt.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: All Cylinders Firing
programme.desc: When Platt goes to her father Robert's for dinner, she warns him to be careful with his new girlfriend, Natalie. As Platt is leaving her father's place, she is assaulted and rushed to Chicago Med.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Big Friends, Big Enemies
programme.desc: When a car plows through a crowd of concert-goers and gunfire erupts, Lindsay and Ruzek are on the scene. Unsure of the motive and concerned about terrorism, they order Homeland Security to assist in the investigation.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Jessica Nelson was a hardworking single mom. Then, one morning, she was found dead in her home. The discovery left her family shattered and their ordeal had just begun. Turns out, the killer was someone they knew.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Something Wicked
programme.desc: Skylar Neese was everything her parents hoped for, but their world turned upside down when she vanished without a trace. At first, police thought she ran away but hints on social media pointed to a more sinister reason for her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Footprint in the Dust
programme.desc: Susie Casey was an outgoing mother of four going through a divorce. She was twenty steps from her front door when she vanished. Police were investigating three men in her life. They were all there the morning of her murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Marcela Whaley
programme.desc: An investigation into the heinous murder of a college student in Las Vegas ignites an international manhunt and exposes a lethal love triangle.

programme.title: Snapped: Kalila Taylor
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a homecoming queen shocks a NY town.

programme.title: Movie: Hall Pass
programme.desc: Two best friends are granted permission by their wives to have extramarital affairs, but when their wives join in on the fun things get a little out of control.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Teenage Mutant Milk-Caused Hurdles
programme.desc: There is a new teacher at Springfield Elementary, and a captivated Bart tries everything to win her over. Meanwhile, Homer decides to buy a new brand of 'milk,' which causes early puberty, both for Bart and Lisa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Much Apu About Something
programme.desc: Sanjay passes his stake in the Kwik-E-Mart to his millennial son, Jay, who turns it into a hip, health food market against Apu's insistence on tradition.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is in the N2-O2-Ar-CO2-Ne-He-CH4
programme.desc: Professor Fink uses science to turn himself into a man who women find attractive. Then, overwhelmed by the attention, he invents an algorithm to perfectly pair the lonely men and women of Springfield, realizing scientific exploration is his true love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gal of Constant Sorrow

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Veterinarian
programme.desc: After performing CPR on a tased raccoon, Lisa discovers her calling to be veterinarian and becomes an intern at the local office, but learns a tough lesson when her neglected class hamster dies.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Marge-ian Chronicles
programme.desc: Lisa volunteers for a future one-way journey to Mars, much to Marge's chagrin. As she searches for a way to convince Lisa not to go, Marge hits upon the most devious strategy of all and volunteers to go along for the ride.

programme.title: Family Guy: V Is for Mystery

programme.title: Family Guy: Veteran Guy

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Dragon's Inferno
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Worlds: King Arthur's Mythical Castles
programme.desc: The medieval ruins of both Tintagel Castle and Stirling Castle contain a fabled history of the mythical King Arthur. Now, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech to unlock the secrets of these ancient structures and reveal the truth behind a legendary ruler.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Vatican Archives Enigma
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Curse of the Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: Mysterious crystal skulls could be long-lost relics of Aztec and Maya civilizations that grant supernatural powers, according to some; experts investigate new leads to reveal if these strange objects are genuine artifacts or if they're modern-day fakes.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for King Arthur's Castle
programme.desc: A castle in Scotland could be the home of King Arthur's legendary round table. Scientists have made a gruesome discovery at this mysterious site: a disfigured skeleton that could reveal the castle's bloody secrets and rewrite the history books.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Vatican Archives Enigma
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Vatican Archives Enigma
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Unearthed: King Arthur's Lost Castle
programme.desc: The clifftop ruins of Tintagel Castle are shrouded in a tumultuous history and believed to be the birthplace of King Arthur. Experts use cutting-edge tech to unlock the secrets of this ancient structure and reveal the truth behind a legendary ruler.

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Relic That Sees the Future
programme.desc: A bizarre 3,000 year-old gold relic crafted with intricately designed cryptic patterns is believed to form a highly complex celestial code. Using advanced imaging technology, experts speculate that it could be an ancient device for predicting the future.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Curse of the Treasure Scrolls
programme.desc: A bizarre find called Copper Scroll is one of the famous Dead Sea Scrolls, but it's unlike any of the others. This strange relic might hold clues to a long-lost treasure, and cutting-edge science may finally reveal answers to this billion-dollar mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Black Mirror
programme.desc: The Obsidian Mirror is a mysterious artifact crafted from volcanic rock, and it's said to be a supernatural device used to communicate with angels and spirits. Experts use cutting-edge tech to discover who made this strange relic and why.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Secrets of the Star Disk
programme.desc: An ancient bronze disk adorned with gold may contain the oldest images of the cosmos ever discovered; using new research and the latest tech, experts investigate if this artifact could be the work of a prehistoric astrologer or just an elaborate hoax.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Doom on the Titanic
programme.desc: New discoveries are challenging everything we know about the sinking of the Titanic, revealing that the disaster wasn't caused by a freak accident and that it may have been doomed from the start.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Fireball From Hell
programme.desc: When a series of accidental explosions erupt at a chemical factory, they completely destroy the area nearby, and now, new discoveries the real reasons behind the deadly chemical fireball that left a giant crater where there was once a building.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Catastrophic Collapse
programme.desc: Over 1,000 people die when an eight-story factory suddenly collapses in one the deadliest engineering disasters in modern history. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal what went wrong, and how to prevent the next catastrophe.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: When Trains Collide
programme.desc: After a high-speed collision of three trains during morning rush hour in London causes dozens of deaths, experts use the latest technology to investigate what caused this catastrophic crash and what secrets could prevent future disasters.

programme.title: Building Giants: The Billion-Dollar Skyscraper
programme.desc: Expert engineers are racing to build a 2,000-foot-tall skyscraper that will be the third-tallest building in the world, but first, they must use cutting-edge tech and innovative construction to finish this record-breaking megastructure.

programme.title: Building Giants: L.A. Mega Rail
programme.desc: An expert team of engineers are using cutting-edge tech and the latest construction methods to build Los Angeles's biggest engineering project ever: a series of brand-new subway lines in durable, earthquake-proof tunnels.

programme.title: Building Giants: Underground Mega Highway
programme.desc: An expert team of engineers use hi-tech explosions and state-of-the-art drilling rigs to tear through solid granite and build an 11-mile underground tunnel, one of the longest in the world.

programme.title: Building Giants: The Invincible Bridge
programme.desc: An expert team of engineers use the latest advances in construction and design to battle deadly earthquakes, intense heat, and punishing deadlines and build a 3,500-long bridge in Los Angeles that's tough enough to brave the world's worst disasters.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Peril at the Airport
programme.desc: An airport that's sinking into the sea, a strange tower that goes wrong, and a dangerous bridge in Venice are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Diabolical: Hands That Rob the Cradle
programme.desc: In early 1980, two eerily similar crimes occur 400 miles apart. They both leave young mother dead and an infant child stolen. Years later, police unravel a plot so cold-blooded, it leaves everyone even seasoned homicide detectives in utter shock.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: John Doe 57
programme.desc: When a tip from a missing person’s network helps identify the body of a John Doe murder victim, investigators question the victim's family and friends to find the killer, and ultimately unravel a dark tale of betrayal.

programme.title: Dead Silent: When a Stranger Knocks
programme.desc: After fleeing her troubled marriage, Deborah Brown and her kids seek refuge at her brother's house in rustic Lebanon, Maine. But when a stranger shows up in the dead of night seeking help, neither Deborah nor her family are prepared for what happens next.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Unicorn Killer
programme.desc: A Philadelphia woman disappears in the fall of 1977. Later, police come to learn the terrifying truth about her whereabouts, but struggle to locate and bring in her killer.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Charmed by a Killer
programme.desc: When a mom disappears from her home, suspicion moves from one admirer to another. Will a surprise confession solve the mystery? Then, a young woman is beaten to death, and her mother starts an international manhunt for the suspected killer.

programme.title: Body Cam: No Surrender
programme.desc: A car crash ignites a fireball that threatens a Maryland officer making a traffic stop. In Ohio, an armed burglar hides in a closet, and officers must smoke him out. In Texas, an officer confronts a wanted felon who suddenly pulls a gun on him.

programme.title: Body Cam: Seconds from Death
programme.desc: An armed robber starts a deadly shootout on a city bus in Maryland. A California police officer races to drag a man from a wheelchair stuck on a train level crossing. In Ohio, police officers attempt to rescue a woman trapped inside a raging house fire.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Monster in the Desert
programme.desc: In 1992, a 19-year-old woman is brutally assaulted outside of Desert Hot Springs, California. Miraculously she escapes, but lives in constant fear that he will find her again one day. What the victim doesn't realize is she survived a serial killer.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Shot in the Night
programme.desc: 33 year-old single mother, Lindsey Wilkins in found shot in the head by an apparent suicide. When no gun is found, police suspect murder and soon uncover a trail of dark secrets and deadly betrayals. Then a shocking twist puts the case in jeopardy.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Online Secrets
programme.desc: In 2014, the scorched remains of a house fire reveal two female victims, a 17 year old girl named Mani and her mother Robin. When investigators dig deeper into the women's lives, they uncover a secret online relationship that led to tragedy.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Taken in Tennessee
programme.desc: In 2011, 20-year-old Holly Bobo was abducted from her home in rural Tennessee. A search turned up some of her personal items, including her cell phone. But Holly was gone. The trail went cold for two years until a hunter made a gruesome find.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Body on Bowden Road
programme.desc: When 20-year-old Stephanie Shea Graham is found murdered on a desolate road, detectives gather clues and question all those closest to her. When the truth is finally revealed, the identity of her killer will prove to be more shocking than ever imagined.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Beneath the Stairs
programme.desc: Curiosity overcomes new homeowners when they spot a barrel in a crawlspace. When they open it, they are horrified to find a body.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Absent Teacher
programme.desc: In 1993, an elementary school teacher goes missing after her first day at a new job. Over the next two months, investigators sift through clues, piecing together the heartbreaking truth behind the young educator's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Adrift
programme.desc: Newlyweds set out for the adventure of a lifetime; their dream of sailing the world together. The honeymoon comes crashing into the dangers of reality for Don when he heads to the one remote island where a serial killer could be in hiding.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Blizzard of Bullets
programme.desc: During chilling winter nights in Idaho, a madman is on the prowl... attacking citizens in a crime spree that stuns families and terrifies whole communities. Investigators must race against time to catch a killer... who kills for the thrill of it.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chameleon
programme.desc: '20/20' reports on a murder mystery that unraveled across the country for over three decades, including details about how cutting edge DNA technology and a mysterious five-year-old girl provided crucial clues that helped authorities solve the case.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Prints of Darkness
programme.desc: When Michael and Melisa Augustson move to little Alma, Georgia they're soon taken in by the community. But on December 14th, Michael comes home to a scene of unspeakable horror. His wife has been murdered, and only one person in the town knows why.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Apartment 23
programme.desc: With graduation nearing at Northeastern University, students are alarmed at the discovery of a fellow co-ed shot to death in her apartment. Detectives face many challenges in the investigation until they realize the answer is right in front of them.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ

programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: O.G. Flavor
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits his hometown of Cleveland, where a lamb burger with kalamata olive salt gives him a nostalgic taste of his Greek heritage.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Street Foods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the street food being fried, skewered or sandwiched around the world, from smoked sausages in Chicago and fish tacos in Baja, Mexico, to pani-puri in India and chimney cakes in Budapest.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Philadelphia
programme.desc: From iconic cheese steaks to stromboli, Andrew uncovers Philly's famous edibles.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Smothered to the Max
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes in for a full day of over-the-top, smothered goodness. Indulgent in every bite, these dishes range from drool-worthy, savory and sumptuous meals to mouthwatering, sticky, sweet and syrupy desserts.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Special Occasion

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked

programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Mexican City
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches Mexico for clues behind the mysterious rise and disappearance of Teotihuacan, a powerful civilization that predated the Aztecs in Mesoamerica.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Kalahari Desert's Lost City
programme.desc: Josh traverses Africa's Kalahari Desert, looking for a fabled lost city.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Roman Empire Treasures
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches Italy for relics looted from the Roman Empire and buried with Visigoth king Alaric.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Mighty Mysteries Off Bermuda
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates the many mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle including infamous shipwrecks, inexplicably lost flights and the disappearance of the mighty megalodon.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Warrior Queen's Treasure
programme.desc: Searching across England, Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legend of Queen Boudica, the legendary Celtic queen who nearly defeated the invading Roman army 2,000 years ago.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: India's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to India in search of Dwarka, a mythical kingdom swallowed by the ocean. To find evidence that the golden city is real, Josh dives into the Arabian Sea and visits a dig site that could rewrite history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Mighty Mysteries Off Bermuda
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates the many mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle including infamous shipwrecks, inexplicably lost flights and the disappearance of the mighty megalodon.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: India's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to India in search of Dwarka, a mythical kingdom swallowed by the ocean. To find evidence that the golden city is real, Josh dives into the Arabian Sea and visits a dig site that could rewrite history.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Curse of the Black Chalice
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters examine their most stunning find: the Black Obsidian Chalice. Together, they investigate the treasure's mysterious origins, decode its strange markings and reveal the secret ceremonies where it may have once been used.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Secrets in the Sword
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters travel to the Holy Land to investigate if their prized sword once belonged to the Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Cutting-edge archaeology reveals a network of hidden tunnels in Jerusalem with ties to the Bible's greatest relics.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters retrace the investigations of Nazi relic hunters who searched for the Holy Grail and other lost Templar relics. Their expedition reveals just how close the Nazis came to uncovering ground-breaking Templar secrets.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Doomsday Relic
programme.desc: A mysterious Templar relic features coded markings that could explain why these once-powerful knights disappeared and why their treasures were buried; using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate their final secrets.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Earth Home
programme.desc: A young couple sets out to build their dream home together in a remote canyon just north of Yellowstone National Park in Montana. They create a timeless, earthen home suited for their challenging climate.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Glacier River Cabin
programme.desc: A young couple leave the Air Force to build a cabin and start a new life in Alaska. With only three weeks to make it ready before winter, they call in family and friends to help. Follow their journey as they endure the elements and handcraft their home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Sweet Homestead Alabama
programme.desc: The Raneys face an emotional rescue of young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama. To save the legacy of an 8th generation family property, they must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!
programme.desc: Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Kevin has a bump in his jawline that is a 'lady deterrent.' Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead that makes her a hermit. Tommy's leg bump makes it difficult for him to work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Leave It to Nevus

programme.desc: Tosha makes a bold confession to her mom. Despite their family's concern, the Merrifields forge ahead with their plans for potential sister wife Roberta. Vanessa and Kaleh clash over their differences. The Snowdens' new girlfriend reveals a secret.

programme.title: Conjoined Twins: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: When they were born to their Dominican mother, conjoined twins Maria and Theresa Tapia were declared doomed in the delivery room, and now, one twin's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Tallest Teens
programme.desc: Meet three of the tallest teenagers in America and learn how they fit into a society designed for people several feet shorter and how will their size impact their future.

programme.title: My 40 Year Old Child
programme.desc: Nicky Freeman is 40 with the body of a 10-year-old. Gabby Williams is 6 years old but no different to a newborn. Both age one year for every four and doctors have no idea why.

programme.title: Born With Albinism: Meet the Grabowskis
programme.desc: Jon and Liz have five adopted children from China. Four of them have albinism, a rare disorder that reduces pigment in the skin and hinders vision. Having children with disabilities can be challenging, but the Grabowskis are considering adopting again.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Wipeout: The Big Balls Are Back, Baby!
programme.desc: Fire performers, a Rock 'n' Roll father-daughter duo, and bubbleologists have a chance to traverse three of the most challenging courses in Wipeout.

programme.title: Wipeout: Big Ball Energy
programme.desc: Forensic scientists, Radio DJs, and a pair of Wipeout Legacies face the most challenging course in Wipeout history for a chance at $25,000.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe try to find house sitters for bizarre homes and pose as researchers studying grocery shopping habits. Later, the big loser has a run-in at the drive-thru with astonished customers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cars
programme.desc: Adam dives into the much-beloved auto industry and exposes the surprising truths behind car dealerships, and the fact that the concept of jaywalking was created by auto manufacturers to blame pedestrians for car crashes.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Forensic Science
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the scary truth behind unreliable methods used as evidence in criminal cases. He exposes the flaws of fingerprinting, hair strand matches, and bite mark analysis, which often send innocent people to jail.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Hygiene
programme.desc: Adam reveals that the term 'halitosis' was popularized in a 1920s ad campaign that used cruel ads to make people insecure about their breath, and explains why running water is one of the greatest miracles of the modern age.
