programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Painted Into a Corner
programme.desc: Todd stresses out Julie when he insists on investing in an oil painting of the family. After a kitchen fire, Grayson decides the Chrisleys need some emergency response training.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hearts and Crafts
programme.desc: Chase rescues Faye when Todd demands on chaperoning her to a Senior Dance. Meanwhile, Todd struggles to come up with a Valentines gift for Julie when she suggests something handmade.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Top Dog
programme.desc: Todd's opinion embarrasses Julie when she offers to organize a children's art fair. Meanwhile, the race is on for top dog when Faye and Grayson enter their pups into a pageant.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Celebrating a Chrisley Century
programme.desc: To celebrate 100 episodes of Chrisley Knows Best, the family takes a look back on all the greatest, most meaningful and overly ridiculous moments from the show.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Panic at the Pageant
programme.desc: Todd takes on too much as the family heads to Florida to run their first Miss Florida USA pageant. Faye makes a rash purchase and is called out on it by Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: No Men for Old Country
programme.desc: Todd's manhood gets called into question during a vacation with family and friends. Meanwhile, Chase has to make amends with Chloe after they get into a fight.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Baking Up is Hard to Do
programme.desc: Todd attempts to be supportive when Julie prepares desserts for a restaurant Grand Opening. Meanwhile, Chase tries to get back in Savannah's good graces as she deals with insecurities.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Running Gout of Time
programme.desc: Julie questions her decision to let Chase help her and Allison train for a 5K. When Todd is diagnosed with gout, he struggles to understand why his family has no sympathy.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Ride or Die
programme.desc: When Julie's stress reaches a breaking point while Todd comes up with a plan to alleviate it. Chase helps Nanny learn to ride a bike.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Going for Broker
programme.desc: After Todd signs a development deal, he fuels a competition between Julie, Chase and Savannah to be the listing agent. Meanwhile, Grayson decides to help Todd get over his fear of snakes.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: America's Next Todd Model
programme.desc: Faye takes the law in to her own hands when the neighborhood kids annoy her. And Todd gets a second shot at becoming a male model.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Say It, Don't Spray It
programme.desc: Todd clashes with Chase when he finds out Chase got back together with his ex-girlfriend. Savannah tests out her spray tanning skills on Nanny Faye.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Emotionally In-Vested
programme.desc: When Nanny frets about leaving Miley behind to go out of town Chase comes up with an idea to help out. Todd lands himself in trouble on a date with Julie.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Time and Punishment
programme.desc: Carrie frets about Aidan's ability to forgive her affair; Miranda discovers leisure.

programme.title: Sex and the City: My Motherboard, Myself
programme.desc: Carrie and Aidan exchange keys; Miranda strains to maintain her strong woman image.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and the Country
programme.desc: Samantha joins Carrie at Aidan's cottage in the country where she meets a cute farmer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Belles of the Balls
programme.desc: Carrie helps Aidan and Big learn to accept each other, while Miranda and Steve get closer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Coulda, Woulda, Shoulda
programme.desc: Miranda reveals that she's pregnant, and after much deliberation, she decides to have the baby. Meanwhile, Samantha uses her connection as a representative for Lucy Liu to her advantage so she can nab a great handbag.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part One)
programme.desc: Kim begins to ease back into her public life, but is blindsided by some upsetting news about Kanye. Meanwhile, Khloé is pressured to mend her relationship with Cait, the family speculate over Kourtney and Scott, and Rob welcomes his first baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part Two)
programme.desc: After receiving some troubling news about Kanye while in New York for the Angel Ball, Kim rushes home to his aid. Meanwhile, Kendall worries that a bad review could jeopardize her modeling career, and Khloé clashes with Malika over priorities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex Files
programme.desc: After an explosive fight between Rob and Chyna, the sisters feel like it is their duty to protect their brother from a toxic relationship. Meanwhile, Kris tries to rebuild her relationship with Cait, but is blindsided by some hurtful allegations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Scott is devastated when he hears a rumor that Kourtney is hooking up with another guy and spirals back into old vices. After taking some personal time following the robbery, Kim is back to work but is reluctant to be in the public eye anymore.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Trippin' Part One
programme.desc: After Kim busts Scott with a girl in Dubai, the family is surprised Kourtney allowed him on the family trip to Costa Rica. The sisters discover Scott has invited yet another girl to join him in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Trippin' Part Two
programme.desc: After the family confronts Scott about his unwelcome guest in Costa Rica, Kourtney must inform him that he's ruined any chance of them getting back together. Meanwhile, Khloé is fed up with her family's bad attitude.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Classic Cars and Vintage Eggs
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney force Khloe to take a sentimental sister trip to Palm Springs to relive some of their fondest childhood memories from a much simpler time. Meanwhile, Rob meets with a life coach and Kris receives a proposition from a royal family.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: It’s a 'Queer Eye' takeover! Bobby Berk joins as guest co-host, and one of the original Fab Five, Jai Rodriguez, stops by for a chat.

programme.title: Modern Family: Farm Strong
programme.desc: Cameron's older, single sister, Pam, is coming for a visit, and Cam is in a panic to hide the engagement until he can delicately break the news to her, but it turns out she has news of her own. Phil and Claire decide to miss one of Luke's soccer games.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Late Show
programme.desc: Jay pulls some strings to get reservations at the new restaurant for an adult's night out. But, in each household, everyone is running late -- Gloria, as usual, is taking forever to get ready, and Claire and Phil are concerned about Luke being home alone.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Help
programme.desc: When Gloria hires a too-good-to-be-true male nanny, Jay and Manny are pretty much dead set against it. Frank is in town and feeling a bit lonely recently, so Phil and Jay take him out to help get his groove back. Mitch and Cam plan their wedding.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: The family attends the annual school fair, and Phil has a big 20th wedding anniversary surprise planned for Claire at the fairgrounds. Unfortunately, she simultaneously has a surprise for him back at home.

programme.title: Modern Family: ClosetCon '13
programme.desc: With some urging from Claire, Jay begrudgingly agrees to return to ClosetCon this year, and things get interesting when Jay is reunited with some old colleagues.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Big Game
programme.desc: With a big football game coming up and a record to break, Coach Cam is intensely focused and showing no mercy even when the opposing team is playing with an unexpected disadvantage.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Old Man and the Tree
programme.desc: Jay takes Manny out to cut down their own Christmas tree, and Gloria is on edge with mom in town, but changes her tune when she sees her bonding with Claire. Then, Mitchell is forced to do last-minute shopping when they didn't get Lily the right gift.

programme.title: Modern Family: And One to Grow On
programme.desc: Phil tricks Luke into taking a dance class, but the jokes on him when the white lie indirectly lands him in the slammer. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria are throwing birthday parties for both Manny and Joe.

programme.title: Modern Family: Under Pressure
programme.desc: The high school open house puts the parents in a bit of a time warp when Claire finds herself stressed out by all the pressure, and Gloria encounters a 'mean girl' mom.

programme.title: Modern Family: Three Dinners
programme.desc: Phil and Claire take Haley out to dinner to discuss her future, but Haley manages to turn the tables. Elsewhere, Jay’s friend Shorty and wife Darlene are back visiting, and they have some news that doesn’t sit well with Jay.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Sibling Duos
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites teams of chef-siblings to compete in two games that will push their sibling bonds to the limit. First, the teams must decide which items from Guy's sample tables they want to feature in their family dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Teen Chefs
programme.desc: Four talented teen chefs are taking over Flavourtown, and Guy Fieri gets things started by having them flip a chicken pot pie into a high-end dinner. Then, a roll of the dice decides the parameters of their international dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Express Lane Extreme: Name Your Number
programme.desc: Guy Fieri unveils the ultimate strategy game in which the four competing chefs must decide whether to use six, eight or ten ingredients before knowing what kind of dish they're making.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: X-Treme ABC Games
programme.desc: Four chefs take on Guy Fieri's Flavortown favourite ABC game in a battle of culinary creativity. Guy is looking for top-tier cooking under extreme conditions, and these competitors must deliver if they want to cash in that $20,000 shopping spree.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Summer Games, Part 1: Backyard Bash
programme.desc: Guy Fieri kicks off summer with a four-part tournament full of summer rituals, games and grilled foods. Three of Guy's favorite DDD chefs join him for a backyard bash, turning classic diner dishes into backyard burgers and sides.

programme.title: Kitchen Crash: Street Fare in New Jersey
programme.desc: Three chefs meet up with host Jeff Mauro in Paramus, NJ, to beg homeowners to shop in their own fridges and share the bounty. The chefs are challenged to use the ingredients in festival-style food, something 'stuffed' 'and street-fair dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Winning Teams
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings back the winning teams of previous competitions for another battle of team supremacy. First, he has them shop without carts for their surf and turf ingredients.

programme.desc: The four remaining food truck teams meet host Tyler Florence on the beach to create their own signature beachside snack. Judges award $300 to the team with the most-delicious beach bite, and the team that sells the most treats earns $300 as well.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Childhood Favorites
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson turns the clock back to being a kid, when life was simpler, and food tasted better. So, enjoy a blast from the past while we revisit some childhood favorites.

programme.title: Chopped: Haricot Flair

programme.title: The Grill of Victory: Grilling Italy

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Game Day BBQ

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fancy Vs. Rustic
programme.desc: The claws are out as "The Kitchen's" Sunny Anderson and Katie Lee try their best to take down Bobby Flay. They've brought in polar opposites, sweet but ferocious Angie Berry and Italian stallion Giuliano Matarese, who are both gunning for victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Worst-Case Scenario
programme.desc: The range heats up when fierce New York chefs Amanda Freitag and Alex Guarnaschelli bring in their heavy-hitters to battle Bobby. Chicago's Chef Jared Case tests his skills against the Greek-inspired Chef Kouri Killmeier.

programme.desc: Skylar Neese was everything her parents hoped for, but their world turned upside down when she vanished without a trace. At first, police thought she ran away but hints on social media pointed to a more sinister reason for her disappearance.

programme.desc: The deepest-diving submersible vessel in the world is one of the most intricately designed craft that has ever been engineered for the sea, and having reached the bottom of each of the five oceans, this submarine's accomplishments are truly monumental.

programme.desc: A devastating rail disaster outside a small North Dakota town results in cargo erupting in massive explosions; experts use the latest science to investigate and uncover an engineering flaw poised for catastrophic failure.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Ghost Park
programme.desc: Deep in the wilderness of the American south, a long-abandoned amusement park is home to secrets of a forgotten, imaginary world. When experts investigate, they reveal why this bizarre place was built and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lockdown
programme.desc: When a crazed gunman terrorizes his neighborhood, officers put themselves in the line of fire to restore order. Then A man discovers his elderly father has been stabbed in the back. The knife itself turns out to be Lt. Joe Kenda's biggest clue.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Kensington Strangler
programme.desc: Elaine Goldberg's body is found in a vacant lot in Philly's ' Badlands,' police believe they discovered a prostitute who had overdosed; but when two more bodies are discovered in the same part of town, detectives fear there may be a serial killer loose.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Candy Run
programme.desc: A family's nightmare begins in September 2014 when 8-year-old Hiawayi Robinson leaves her apartment to play but never returns. The desperate search to find her leads investigators to surveillance footage that sends shockwaves through the community.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Robin Tattoo

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Kind of a Vicious Person
programme.desc: Apache County Sheriff's Office begins a double homicide investigation after the gruesome discovery of an elderly couple's remains in Sanders, Arizona. A statewide hunt for the perpetrator challenges veteran investigators resulting in an unusual arrest.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Lake House
programme.desc: In 1980, in Radford, Virginia, college freshman Gina Hall goes out dancing and never returns. Police follow her trail to a mysterious lake house, but where she goes from there is a mystery that has endured for 40 years.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: a dead man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness. But when the young victim's checkered past is uncovered, Kenda must wade through a laundry list of potential suspects to find the man's killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Kind of a Vicious Person
programme.desc: Apache County Sheriff's Office begins a double homicide investigation after the gruesome discovery of an elderly couple's remains in Sanders, Arizona. A statewide hunt for the perpetrator challenges veteran investigators resulting in an unusual arrest.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Lake House
programme.desc: In 1980, in Radford, Virginia, college freshman Gina Hall goes out dancing and never returns. Police follow her trail to a mysterious lake house, but where she goes from there is a mystery that has endured for 40 years.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lockdown
programme.desc: When a crazed gunman terrorizes his neighborhood, officers put themselves in the line of fire to restore order. Then A man discovers his elderly father has been stabbed in the back. The knife itself turns out to be Lt. Joe Kenda's biggest clue.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Whispers from the Dead
programme.desc: In Little Falls, Minn., a retiree's peace is shattered by a home break-in, culminating in a gruesome double-homicide. Investigators discover audio recordings of the killings, revealing what really happened and the killer's true motives.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lie For Me
programme.desc: Air Force veteran Michael Giles disappears along with his savings of $206,000. Detectives discover a woman named Kwaneta Harris has been draining the man's accounts. But as they dig deeper, detectives uncover a massive conspiracy of greed and murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Family or Foe
programme.desc: A young family in La Mirada, CA is out for an evening stroll when terror strikes. For investigation nothing seems to add up. Is it random violence or a mastermind at work? The truth will take years to emerge.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Blood Money
programme.desc: After two-long lost brothers connect as young adults, a dark disturbance emerges within the newly blended family unit.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: No Secret Is Safe
programme.desc: An early morning home invasion and double-murder appears to be drug-related, but when investigators speak to the lone survivor of the attack they discover a more sinister motive.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Lust for Murder
programme.desc: When Stacie Smith is found dead and an accusation that she has been unfaithful is written on the wall of the crime scene, police believe that a jealous lover is behind her brutal death. But that might just be a ploy to frame the wrong man for the crime.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Gambling With The Devil
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her car by her husband and son.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: An investigation on the murder of a mother focuses on her violent husband until a jailhouse snitch reveals new information.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Some Kind of Monster
programme.desc: When Manjit Basra and Mukhtiar Panghali settle down and start a family, it seems like a dream come true. But this dream turns into a nightmare, with a heart-breaking ending that leaves everyone questioning what they thought they knew.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The House Out on Wade Road
programme.desc: Byron and Michele Wright overcome broken homes to find solace in one another. But when their blissful union falls apart and a new man arrives on the scene, it unearths violent secrets and a shocking truth.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: In Sickness and Health
programme.desc: Cynthia Smith and David Mueller couldn't be more different, but they say opposites attract. When these two meet, there's an instant connection.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Control, Kill, Delete
programme.desc: Matt and Niqué Leili's love story is a modern romance. They meet online, create a blended family, and appear to have it all. But on July 8, 2011, the illusion of a happy marriage is torn apart forever.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Family Searches a Small Town for the Ultimate Open Space
programme.desc: With two kids under the age of 10, Jaime and Kyle Ferguson are drawn to the good schools and spacious lots in the area of McGregor, Texas. They are looking for a house with four bedrooms, an open kitchen and lots of trees.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Lackluster Fixer Changes to Contemporary Charm for Young Family
programme.desc: Luke and Rachel Whyte are a young couple with a baby girl, and they feel it's time to settle into a family-sized house. They're looking for a house with 3 to 4 bedrooms, and Rachel is hoping for a space that she can make into a playroom/home office.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Parents of College Students Find Fixer Close to Campus
programme.desc: Ben and Stacie are looking for a home in Waco to be near their children at college.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1839 Lofty Master Suite
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin and his team are recruited to bring back some much-needed character to the master suite of an 1839 farmhouse.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1735 Master Bedroom Retreat
programme.desc: Jeff meets up with a homeowner to restore the living room and bedroom in the oldest portion of her 1735 stone home. Jeff lowers an historic mantel in the living room and turns the master into a retreat with a wall of stone.

programme.title: Stone House Revival
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin and his team help families to restore their stone homes to their former glory.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Dining Room Discoveries
programme.desc: A couple calls on Jeff to restore every ounce of character he can find in their historic home. They also want him to bring a little history into their 1970s living room addition. Jeff finds not one, but two big surprises hidden in the dining room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1825 Family Room Fix
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked to restore a crumbling family room and adjacent sun room in an 1825 stone home. He and his team bring in a stunning bluestone floor and create tons of built-in storage. They transform the sun room into an airy home office.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1785 Three-Room Makeover
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on his latest project, a 1785 stone farmhouse owned by the Vitale family in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Jeff's first task is to give a facelift to the 230-year-old fireplace. He then moves on to the kitchen and mudroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Classic Colonial Parlor
programme.desc: An 1800s Center Colonial farmhouse addition to a 1760 stone home is turned into a classic parlor with a bar area and a billiards room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1817 Chopped-Up Kitchen
programme.desc: Brandon, the owner of an 1817 stone house, needs help with his kitchen. The kitchen was converted from a side porch in the 1970s, but the strange layout and the materials don't match the rest of the house.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bluefield House
programme.desc: The crew deliver a large lamppost that will serve as the focal point of a new community space. Before taking on this project, the team visits the Bluefield House in West Virginia to find classic commodities needed to restock the warehouse.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1859 Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited by friends Scott and Melanie to renovate the 1980s kitchen addition on their 1859 farmhouse. The previous owner did his best to preserve some 19th century style, but the layout doesn't work and the features are dated.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Saving a 1717 Spring House
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin and his team take on one of their most challenging projects, a dilapidated 1717 spring house. Homeowners Barbara and Joseph want to turn the spring house into a guest house with a writing space for author Barbara.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1717 Farmhouse Kitchen
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on a kitchen and living area in a rundown 1717 farmhouse. The original hardwood floors are a mess, the foyer and living room are drab and the kitchen addition doesn't match the character of the original house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Master Suite in a Barn
programme.desc: John and Tina own a converted 1740s barn and they need help with their awkward master bedroom and bath.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Kitchen and Dining Room
programme.desc: A couple have just bought an historic stone home with portions built in the 1700s, 1800s, and 1990s. They want Jeff to look at their dining room, kitchen and sunroom. They want a more open floor plan, but Jeff will have to move stone walls.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1751 Two-Floor Restoration
programme.desc: A mother and daughter bring Jeff in to restore two rooms in the original portion of their 1751 stone home. Jeff and his team give the dining room a slightly formal farmhouse feel. Then they achieve a rustic and refined style in the bathroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740 Little House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited to restore a 1740 stone home that sits behind couple Kelly and Rob's suburban 1990s home. They call it the "little house," and it sat right in the middle of the action of one of the most famous Revolutionary War battles.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s First Floor Restoration
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is recruited by homeowners Scott and Rhonda to fully restore the first floor sunroom, living room and dining room of their 1700s stone home.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Original Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is called on to renovate a dated kitchen believed to be in the same spot as the original one that was built in the 1800s. By restoring much of the kitchen's history, Jeff and team are able to bring in a classic farmhouse style to the home.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1732 Kitchen Relocation
programme.desc: Jeff visits a couple at their 1732 home to address their wish to build a new kitchen in their living room. During the renovation, they face a few bumps as they knock down a wall, relocate the plumbing and try to bring some history back to the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Wildebeest and Waterfalls
programme.desc: Texas grandparents want a backyard and waterfall that is even more of an attraction for their grandkids than the exotic animals that live next door. The crew create an oversized fire pit, a dog-friendly Baja shelf and a boulder waterfall.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cabanas and Cannonballs
programme.desc: A couple who recently moved into a new house in Austin, Texas, has decided it's finally time to build the family pool of their kids' dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dueling Waterslides
programme.desc: Brian and Paul design the perfect pool complete with giant dueling waterslides. They face a slippery slope, however, when they battle equipment issues while building an artificial hill to support tens of thousands of pounds of natural granite rock.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Custom Contemporary
programme.desc: Matt and Jen want to tear out their old deck and rebuild their backyard to match the hill country modern vibe they love and give them a place to enjoy quality family time.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Million Dollar View Pool
programme.desc: The King family seeks help building their new palace in the sunny hills of California. The Pool Kings find themselves between a rock ledge and hard design while bringing this build to life on a sloped property.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Caribbean
programme.desc: After years of vacationing on the island of Roatan, a couple has decided to just build the Caribbean in their back yard. The team design a curvilinear pool with infinity edge, a sunken bar area, six water features and a realistic beach entry.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Slammin' Hot and Smoky
programme.desc: In Asheville, N.C., Michael Symon digs into a slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Small Town to Farmville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Nederland Heritage Festival, where food from around the world is prepared by an army of volunteers. From the cowboy pistolettes to sopapillas to chicken fried bacon and a very fun egg-stravaganza, see all the delicious delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Some Like It Popped
programme.desc: Noah hits the Big Butler Fair in Prospect, PA., where he tears into the Conevore, filled to the brim with smoked brisket, pork and chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fry Harder
programme.desc: Noah Cappe soaks up the California sunshine while enjoying some wacky West Coast treats at the San Diego County Fair in Del Mar, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Local Legends
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best dishes that have achieved local legend status. From sentimental favorites like deep-dish pizza, patty melts and spaghetti and meatballs to an old-fashioned clambake and lobster roll.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Nosh-ville
programme.desc: Food Paradise heads down south to Nashville, TN, in search of some crave worthy comfort foods that satisfy the soul. From barbecue to burgers and even a Thai twist on pizza, the food is so good it's turning Nashville into Nosh-ville.

programme.title: Food Paradise: T.G.I. Fried
programme.desc: Diners enjoy fry-day every day at these hot spots across the country, from super-stacked crispy chicken sandwiches and deep-fried lobster tails to sweet potato beignets and fanciful churros.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Halifax
programme.desc: Chef Jordan Andino heads up Canada's east coast to check out the nightlife in Halifax, Nova Scotia. He starts at The Watch That Ends the Night for one of the best grilled cheese sandwiches he's ever had.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pork
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels the country to discover the top fifteen greatest pork dishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Brunch

programme.title: Man Fire Food: West Coast Roasts
programme.desc: Visiting the Passmore Ranch in Sloughhouse, Roger must try to catch a fish by hand. Also, at the Santa Maria Elks Lodge, he will assist in building a fire pit for cooking up some beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Holy Smokes!
programme.desc: Roger attends the 100 year anniversary of the St. Mary Magdalene Church Picnic in Owensboro, Kentucky. Several thousand pounds of meat will cook over 100 feet of fire and smoke.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Twist On Texas 'cue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits two restaurants in the Lone Star State that turn traditional Texas-style barbecue into crafty culinary creations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Cornfields to Canada
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota, where he goes local with the North Woods sandwich and Barbe-chos. Then it’s across the border to the Red River Exhibition to experience a Canadian classic, prairie poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Rock 'n' Roll to Red River
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers that cheddar chimneys make him twist and shout at Burlington’s Sound of Music Festival and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the redneck taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California State Fair/ Northeast State Fair
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chows down on a lobster corn dog in California, and tries a deep fried peanut butter and banana sandwich in Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Noah dives into some of the cheesiest dishes featured on Carnival Eats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Doggin'
programme.desc: Noah visits Maryland for a crab dip smothered dog; California for a cheesy, spicy Chile Relleno dog and a dessert dog covered in whipped cream and chocolate.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fusion Fiesta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lifts the lid on the American melting pot to reveal some decadent, delicious results. When fair goers meet fusion foods, the results can only be world domination.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Happy/ Old Man Patrick
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't drive, but you don't need a license to operate a self-driving car. Patrick thinks he is an old man, so SpongeBob reminds him how much fun it is to be a kid.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fun-Sized Friends/ Grandmum's the Word
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves. Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Missing Identity/ Plankton's Army
programme.desc: SpongeBob loses his nametag; Plankton is after the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Pat make extra money when they decide to sell chocolate bars door to door. Also, Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy get into an fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gives SpongeBob a pair of squeaky boots in lieu of pay. No problem, as SpongeBob loves them and learns to master the squeaking noise to a new height of communication.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus/ Suction Cup Symphony
programme.desc: Plankton builds a Roman coliseum, and puts on a free gladiator show featuring togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. / Squidward is determined to win the Bikini Bottom Symphony's composition contest, but SpongeBob and Patrick keep distracting him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort
programme.desc: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guilt Trip/ Short Cut
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and her primos try to win Maria a trip around the world./ When Carlota fails at hair cutting, she trains with the master barber himself – CJ.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Grandparent Trap/ Miss Step
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Cursed!
programme.desc: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: No Egrets/ Meal Ticket
programme.desc: Sergio is in for a treat when a group of baby birds think he’s their mama. Ronnie Anne and Sid help Casey run his family food truck… at the Yoon Kwan concert.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: What's Love Gato Do With It/ Dial M. for Mustard
programme.desc: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it. Ronnie Anne and friends try to uncover what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Between a Rope and a Hard Place
programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Chosen Chipmunk/ Double Dangus
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's new virtual reality game and is transported to a world in desperate need of a hero. The chipmunks discover Officer Dangus has a twin brother.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Tree House/ Saving Simon
programme.desc: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they made it their home. Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to stop his departure and keep him at home.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dr. Zap vs Electroboy/ Animal House Party
programme.desc: Theodore is hit by lightning and believes he's like his comic book hero, until he's told he's actually a villain. When Derek overhears that Alvin and his brothers are alone for the weekend, he plans a wild party.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Beach Blanket Bozos/ Poltergeeks
programme.desc: Dad admits he dropped out of school in grade 5 and joins Timmy's class.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: When L.O.S.E.R.S. Attack
programme.desc: Timmy's enemies join forces and form the League Of Super Evil Revenge Seekers.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Manic Mom Day/ Crocker of Gold
programme.desc: Timmy wishes the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale; Mom and Dad have a surf-off.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Con/ The Hungry Games
programme.desc: Mr. Crocker creates Wonky Cosmo and Wanda clones to get into a Fairy Convention to steal all the fairies' magic. Timmy wishes Chloe could live out her favorite dystopian movie, but quickly regrets it when everyone is hungry.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: An Udder Mess/ Teacher's Fret
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wins two tickets to Dairyland – but has to choose between her besties Sid and Lincoln for the day. / When Ronnie Anne finds out her dad is dating her teacher, she teams with Sid to break them up ASAP.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Temp/ Parent Trap
programme.desc: When Bocarter's father helps him with his class project, Alvin enlists Dave's help, locking the two families in a heated competition.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Double Trouble/ Liar Liar
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's lab and accidentally clones himself; Alvin tells a small lie that quickly turns into a huge disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: I Was a Middle Aged Robot/ Suddenly Suzy
programme.desc: Candace is determined to win this year's father-daughter obstacle course, but unfortunately, Lawrence finds Agent P's lair and his memory is accidentally erased by a gadget.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Just Passing Through/ Candace's Big Day
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create an orb that allows them to pass through solid objects and to ultimately, help them retrieve Mom's favourite guitar pick for her gig at the Mayor's Day Festival.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Jimmy Steals the Show
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Return to Roblox High School
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: AquaDan
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Get Busted
programme.desc: Candace has finally busted her brothers and sent away to Smile Away Reformatory School. How long can Candace enjoy her summer with Jeremy and Stacy instead of her usual routine?

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: A Tale of Two Stans
programme.desc: Stan decides to run for Mayor of Gravity Falls to earn the kids’ and the townsfolk respect.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Young Blood, Old Souls
programme.desc: Luz's skills as a witch are put to the test when she attempts the impossible.

programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot

programme.title: The American Game: Notre Dame
programme.desc: The story of college football can't be told without the story of its most legendary program - its rise to lore, its glories and triumphs, its superstars and icons, its controversies and contradictions.

programme.title: The American Game: Rivalries
programme.desc: If passion lies at the heart at college football, then rivalries are what fuel the passion in dramatic, intense and entertaining ways. In this sport, the more you want to beat your enemy, the more exciting that makes the matchup.

programme.title: The American Game: The Culture
programme.desc: College football is more than just a sport – it's a cultural phenomenon. To understand the game, you have to understand how much everything around it matters too – from the team colors to the uniforms to the bands, the mascots and more.

programme.title: The American Game: Evolution
programme.desc: College football has evolved in so many transformative ways. All throughout its history, the sport's constant evolutions have had common threads, with officials and coaches striving to make it safer, more exciting and more entertaining.

programme.title: The Greatest: Inspiring Moments
programme.desc: If the best parts of sports are how they can inspire people, college football has enjoyed a wealth of unforgettable moments that fans will cherish forever. These are the top 11 of those highlights, on the field and off.

programme.title: Betty

programme.title: Movie: Duplex

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married Too?

programme.title: Movie: Battleship

programme.title: Movie: Born on the Fourth of July

programme.title: Movie: Act of Valor
programme.desc: When a CIA agent is kidnapped, a team of elite Navy SEALS set out on a mission to recover the agent.

programme.title: Movie: Saving Private Ryan

programme.title: Movie: U-571

programme.title: Movie: Drive Angry
programme.desc: A father escapes from hell to hunt down the man who killed his daughter and abducted his granddaughter.

programme.title: Movie: End of Days
programme.desc: Satan seeks to escape his confinement of Hell. To accomplish this he must take his pre-determined bride before the new millennium. An alcoholic bodyguard must protect the innocent woman from becoming Satan's bride and prevent the end of days.

programme.title: Movie: Amy

programme.title: Movie: Dreamland

programme.title: Movie: 21 Bridges

programme.title: Movie: Cloud Atlas

programme.title: Movie: The Good Shepherd
programme.desc: An idealistic student at Yale joins a secret society and eventually gets involved in the creation of the CIA. Gradually, his work as a covert operative begins to affect every aspect of his life, including his ideals.

programme.title: Movie: Bloodshot

programme.title: Run the World: What You Wish For

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park: The Coon
programme.desc: 'The Coon' rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park. When another superhero encroaches on his territory, The Coon seeks out some unlikely allies.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: When the Gun Goes Bang, Bang, Bang
programme.desc: After an undercover cop working a narcotics-smuggling sting is shot dead, the killers next turn their sites on Boston homicide headquarters, leaving Jane, Maura and Frankie Jr. trapped in a fight for survival.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: We Don't Need Another Hero
programme.desc: Jane is honoured as a hero at a public event but the celebration is short-lived when disaster strikes. The ensuing case reunites Jane with an old high school flame who may be the person she needs to help her heal emotionally.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Living Proof
programme.desc: Jane and Maura's relaxing day at an outdoor spa is anything but when they discover the murder of a pregnant woman serving as a surrogate mother. Soon the hunt is on the find the baby's biological parents.

programme.title: Movie: The Proposal
programme.desc: When a pushy businesswoman learns that her VISA has run out and she'll be deported back to Canada, she forces her assistant to marry her. Her assistant agrees to the plan, but only if she promises to give him a promotion.

programme.title: Movie: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Two long-time best girlfriends are getting married. They wind up scheduling their weddings on the same day and their plans turn into a competition with each other. The friendship becomes a bitter rivalry over their dream weddings.
