programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Flipping Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashionable upcyclers, Jenn and Julissa, face off against drinking buddies, TomTom and Gina.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Super Flippers!
programme.desc: Designing friends, Dani and Mo (aka the Wonder Twins), put their heroic flipping powers to the test against the Dynamic Duo of James and Delilah.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Family Flippers
programme.desc: Family pride is on the line when mother/ daughter flippers Leigh and Katey go toe-to-toe against father/ son duo Max and Chris.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: North Carolina Renewal
programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Out of Date in the Outer Banks
programme.desc: With two active children and busy jobs, Stacey and Doug are hoping to find a beach house in the Outer Banks of North Carolina to give their family a place to relax and recharge. They find a home, but it must be renovated from top to bottom.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste
programme.desc: Chef Beau MacMillan dives into scallops; Roger Mooking travels to Texas for succulent chicken.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Travel to Los Angeles, where the weather is warm and the local food is fantastic.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: Spice of Life: The Red Gold of Ethiopia
programme.desc: Known as the Red Gold of Ethiopia, the spice blend berbere is the culinary backbone of many Ethiopian dishes. Hawa Hassan visits Brooklyn's Ghenet restaurant for Injera and Doro Wett (also known as Doro Wat) and creates berbere-infused halibut tibs.

programme.title: Spice of Life: Nigeria's National Spice
programme.desc: Hawa Hassan explores the beloved Nigerian street food Suya, a grilled meat dish flavored by a peanut-based spice of the same name. Inspired by a visit to Chef Hema Agwu in Brooklyn, Hawa uses Suya in her peanut soup with chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Emilia-Romagna
programme.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, and discovers ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano, and tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Palm Springs
programme.desc: Andrew spotlights the desert oasis of Palm Springs, CA. The sunny resort city features new and iconic spots serving up eats like grilled rib eye and bone marrow butter, the popular reuben stacker and the classic date milkshake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Alaska's Inside Passage
programme.desc: Andrew gets a whole new taste of Alaska when he visits the Inside Passage. Andrew finds out that people in this part of Alaska are still making the most of the bounty that nature has provided. He tries sea cucumbers, salmon eggs, and roasted fish heads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Austin
programme.desc: The food in Austin can get a little weird but that's a compliment in a city where funky is part of the pioneer spirit.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Tears are shed as things get off to a smoky start in the Wildfire round. The Crossfire round sees the chefs fishing for a win. In the Feast of Fire, it's a BBQ battle of Superfoods for the title of Fire Masters Champion.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX

programme.desc: Dad thinks Bluey and Bingo have too many toys! Bluey and friends get ambushed by the Terriers! Bluey and Bingo play a game of Burger Shop with Dad.

programme.title: Bluey: The Doctor / The Claw / Markets
programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Blame It on the Rain/ Busted Boomer
programme.desc: Alma accidentally leaves her stuffed cow Moo Moo outside on a rainy day. Doc helps cure a deflated soccer ball with what is diagnosed as 'Deflate-ulosis'.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Say It Again, Sadie/ Mind Over Matter
programme.desc: When Emmie's new talking toy won't talk, Doc gives her a check-up and realizes that the other toys must first talk to her so that she can increase her vocabulary. Then, Doc helps Saltwater Serge discover how to use his imagination.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Case of the Missing Badge/ Rainy, Rainy, Don't Go Away
programme.desc: When a K-9 pup discovers that her human’s police badge is missing, she enlists the pugs help! The pugs help Auggie and Mo overcome their fear during their first thunderstorm.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest

programme.desc: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him he's not. Brittany is embarrassed by Jeanette's lack of style until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's icon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Heroes/ She's Got Style
programme.desc: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him he's not. Brittany is embarrassed by Jeanette's lack of style until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's icon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Between a Rope and a Hard Place
programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Chosen Chipmunk/ Double Dangus
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's new virtual reality game and is transported to a world in desperate need of a hero. The chipmunks discover Officer Dangus has a twin brother.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mission Responsible/ Hair-I-Cane
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted, so Timmy volunteers to baby-sit and give them a night out. Timmy's tired of getting really bad haircuts from Dad.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Knitwits/ Dimmsdale's Got Talent?

programme.title: The Loud House: Wheel and Deal/ Feast or Family
programme.desc: Lana wants to win a race car ride-along with her hero, so she and Lincoln enter to compete in a soap box derby.When Luan must enroll in a culinary class, Dad uses it to share his passion for cooking with one of his kids.

programme.title: The Loud House: Deep Cuts/ Game Off
programme.desc: Luna leads a protest to save the high school music club; Lana becomes desperate to play Lincoln's trash-themed video game.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Sweet Spot/ A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to obtain a prime seat for the family's roadtrip. Lincoln acts more mature in order to eat at the adult table.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Laughing Matter/ No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Roller Cowards/ Bucket Sweet Bucket
programme.desc: When the scariest roller coaster ever opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park, SpongeBob and Patrick are determined to ride it. But the more they think about it, the less they want to do it. Later, Plankton tricks SpongeBob into fixing the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants
programme.desc: Tired of his busy life SpongeBob decides to go to the Jellyfish fields and live off the land.

programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whirlybrains/ MermaidPants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Trenchbillies/ Sponge-Cano
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick fall into a cavern where frightful Trenchbillies keep them hostage.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Barnacle Face/ Pet Sitter Pat
programme.desc: The night before the big school dance, Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face.

programme.desc: A monster terrorizes Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature. Then, SpongeBob and all the Bikini Bottom citizens disappear to an underwater resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup

programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.desc: Adventurers inadvertently resurrect a malevolent force with unspeakable power.

programme.title: The Cypher

programme.title: Movie: The One and Only Dick Gregory
programme.desc: Stunning archival footage and contemporary interviews help take a closer look at comedian Dick Gregory's legacy. Documenting his personal reinventions, while also hearing from entertainers who have been inspired by his blueprint.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Lang vs. Brown
programme.desc: Betrayed by his girlfriend and best friend, a Sacramento, CA man enters court, with his mother, to learn if he is the biological father of his ex’s child.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Woody vs. Wilson
programme.desc: A Vacaville, CA man is devastated to learn the child named after him may not be his biological son.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Best friends are disputing unpaid rent and utility bills. Then, Alicia is suing John for $2000 in unpaid rent, utilities and rides to work; John says he owes nothing and there was never an agreement for him to repay her.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff says she always heard rumors that she and the defendant share the same father, so she has petitioned the court for a sibling DNA test.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Scaring a Guy Silly.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Loafing Around ' and 'Making a Mess of Things.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Bar Hoppin'/ Family Matters
programme.desc: A customer claims a bar served him too much alcohol; a sister claims her brother failed to repay a loan.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Ahmad is suing after he rented a vehicle from Arthur and all went downhill. Arthur says he owes Ahmad nothing as, not only was there damage to the car he rented, but he believes the EZ pass account was forged in his name.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I May Have a Past But I'm Not a Thief
programme.desc: Natasha accuses her cousin Nia of stealing her rent money. Plus, Samantha suspects that her fiancé Patrick stole money to keep his gay lifestyle secret. Afterwards, Sadie believes her niece Trina stole $800.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Dad, I Hooked Up With Your Wife
programme.desc: Sadat has always wanted to have a better relationship with his father Terrance. But for whatever reason, Terrance always kept his son at arm's length. With the lack of attention from Terrance, Sadat to do the unthinkable hooked up with his wife Deniah.

programme.title: Maury: DNA Mystery ... Did My Son Father a Baby Before He Died?
programme.desc: Ashley is back with a new man Tyris to see if he's her baby's father. Lakisha's son Jordan was killed , and now she and her cousin Precious are hoping he's the father of Neffy's baby.

programme.title: What Starts Here
programme.desc: Each semester, Longhorn Network will go behind the scenes to investigate the most compelling academic stories in and around the 40 Acres as part of this new thirty-minute program.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XVII
programme.desc: Sam Ehlinger, Andrew Jones and Alex Watson are three Texas athletes who exemplify the term 'Texas Tough.' We chronicle the obstacles they have had to overcome and how these experiences shaped their lives.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XVIII
programme.desc: For Pride Month, we highlight the stories of David Alviar, Jacob Cornish and Jordan Windle. Three athletes who have experienced personal journeys that have shaped their athletic careers.

programme.desc: A 30-minute show featuring Texas Golf's amazing run to defeat Alabama for the 2012 NCAA title.
